title: Blue Razz's Wanted Features
description: Adds the Most Requested Features to Minecraft!
body:
!ATTENTION!: this needs geckolib to work

Are you tired of vanilla Minecraft missing that one thing you really wanted? Ever wished Mojang would just add that tiny but game-changing feature? Well now… they kind of did — because YOU asked for it

this mod adds the most requested features to a new biome to a bunch of new advancments

this mod adds:
.Mega Birch Forest
.Hammers which are faster and better then axes
.More Recipes with items that dont have one like enchented golden apples
.Glare which you can tame
.TNT Barrels Both Mini and Mega
.The Illusioner added back
.Fireflys that spawn in swamps
.and more ADVANCEMENTS

Hammers and TNT Barrels were TWDJunior's idea he dosent have a modrinth account but he does have a youtube channel

[https://www.youtube.com/@OfficialTWDJunior](https://www.youtube.com/@OfficialTWDJunior)
